que: What is the primary purpose of the Table widget in Flutter?
options: To display a single scrollable child
To arrange widgets in a grid of rows and columns, similar to an HTML table
To show a list of items vertically
To overlay widgets on top of each other

que: Which property of Table holds the rows of the table?
What is the type of objects contained in the children list of a Table?
Which property of Table is used to specify custom widths for specific columns?
Which property of Table specifies the default width for columns when no specific width is provided?
What is the default value of defaultColumnWidth in the Table constructor?
Which property of Table sets the text direction (e.g., left-to-right or right-to-left)?
What is the default value of children in Table?
options: A single row with one empty cell

que: Which property of Table controls the outline or borders drawn around and between cells?
Which property sets the default vertical alignment of cells inside a Table?
What is the default value of clipBehavior in the Table constructor?
Which property of Table is related to aligning text baselines across rows?
Which of the following best describes the children property of Table?
options: List of widgets for each cell
List of TableRow widgets, each representing a row
Map of column index to width
Single widget that contains all rows

que: Which widget is mentioned as an alternative for displaying data tables with sorting and pagination?
Which widgets are suggested as simpler alternatives to Table for basic linear layouts?
Which of these is a good use case for the Table widget?
options: Overlaying widgets on top of each other
Displaying a small grid of labels and values in rows and columns
